lessons.title: C# Introduction
lessons.content:
What is C#?

  • C# (C-Sharp) is a programming language developed by Microsoft that runs on the .NET Framework.
  • C# is used for developing web apps, desktop apps, mobile apps, games and much more.
  • C# is an object-oriented language that is easy to learn.

lessons.title: C# Get Started
lessons.content:
C# Quickstart

using System; namespace HelloWorld {   class Program {     static void Main(string[] args) {       Console.WriteLine("Hello World!");     }   } }

quiz.question: Which of the following is the correct extension for C# files?
Which keyword is used to output text to the console in C#?
Which data type is used to store high-precision decimal values in C#?
How do you declare a variable of type integer in C#?
Which symbol is used for C# comments?
